overview.title: Audit Overview
overview.description: Use the audit workbench to identify investigation-worthy spikes, pivot by request or actor, and correlate suspicious changes before opening raw logs.

queue.label: Open investigation queue
queue.meta: Cases that still need actor or request-level triage.

scope.label: Highest-risk scope
scope.meta: Current slice concentrates on RBAC and session control events.

correlation.label: Cross-system correlation
correlation.meta: Signals already linked to monitor and plugin lifecycle surfaces.

failedAuth.title: Failed Authentication
failedAuth.description: Watch repeated failed sign-in attempts before they spread into permission-denied noise.

permissionDenied.title: Permission Denied
permissionDenied.description: Use as an entry point for request-chain analysis and role ownership review.

sensitiveActions.title: Sensitive Operations
sensitiveActions.description: Privilege-sensitive writes that should be explainable by actor, role, and resource.

escalation.title: Escalation Candidates
escalation.description: Investigation paths that already crossed the threshold for deeper incident review.

overview.trendSubtitle: Track trend shifts before picking a request chain, actor, or plugin slice for detailed investigation.
overview.anomalySubtitle: Prioritize spikes that deserve correlation work instead of passive monitoring.

failedAuth.title: Failed auth spike
failedAuth.description: Recent failed authentication activity is rising faster than baseline.
failedAuth.compareText: Compared with the prior observation window

permissionDenied.title: Permission deny concentration
permissionDenied.description: Permission-denied responses are clustering around a small actor/resource set.
permissionDenied.compareText: Compared with the prior observation window

pluginLifecycle.title: Plugin lifecycle churn
pluginLifecycle.description: Plugin reload and scheduler-control events are creating downstream investigation load.
pluginLifecycle.compareText: Compared with the prior observation window

suspiciousIp.title: Suspicious IP sequence
suspiciousIp.description: Multiple failed sign-ins and denied requests from the same edge network.

tokenAnomaly.title: Token refresh anomaly
tokenAnomaly.description: Refresh activity is arriving too close to permission-denied responses.

privilegeEscalation.title: Privilege escalation path
privilegeEscalation.description: Role binding and sensitive writes appear within the same investigation corridor.

overview.hotspotSubtitle: Group by actor, resource, and plugin boundary to decide where the next drilldown belongs.

actor.title: Operations by privileged operators
actor.description: A small set of admins account for most role and permission mutations in the current slice.

meta.two: 2 actors overlap failed auth and denied traces
meta.three: Pivot by actor timeline before escalation

resource.title: RBAC and session resources
resource.description: Role bindings and session controls keep reappearing across denied or retried operations.

meta.three: Resource pivot keeps request chain small

plugin.title: Lifecycle and scheduler controls
plugin.description: Plugin reloads and scheduler stops are causing downstream audit attention in multiple domains.

meta.one: Lifecycle changes correlate with monitor noise
meta.two: Scheduler actions show elevated deny rates
meta.three: Keep plugin and monitor traces linked

overview.entrySubtitle: Open the log workbench from a concrete question, not from a generic event list.

failedAuth.title: Investigate failed authentication
failedAuth.description: Start from authentication failures, then pivot into request and actor correlation.

rbacChanges.title: Review RBAC changes
rbacChanges.description: Inspect role updates, permission binding shifts, and actor ownership drift.

sensitiveOps.title: Trace sensitive operations
sensitiveOps.description: Follow delete, reset, and role-assignment flows that need stronger justification.

pluginOps.title: Correlate plugin operations
pluginOps.description: Check plugin lifecycle events against runtime or permission anomalies.

overview.correlationSubtitle: Audit should not stay isolated from monitor, auth, or plugin lifecycle signals.

pluginReload.title: Plugin reload followed by deny spike
pluginReload.description: A reload window was followed by a short-lived permission-denied concentration.
pluginReload.nextStep: Open plugin operations preset and trace the shared request chain.

authSpike.title: Failed auth preceding role mutation
authSpike.description: Authentication failures cluster immediately before a privileged role adjustment.
authSpike.nextStep: Correlate actor timeline and inspect role ownership change.

monitorLink.title: Runtime signal linked to audit churn
monitorLink.description: Monitor reports transient runtime instability during a burst of scheduler actions.
monitorLink.nextStep: Keep monitor and audit tabs aligned while reviewing request IDs.

overview.timelineSubtitle: A sampled chain that shows how events become cases worth opening in the log workbench.

failedSignin.title: Failed sign-in burst detected
failedSignin.description: Multiple sign-in failures appear for the same privileged actor window.
failedSignin.context: Actor pivot suggested before opening the log table.

roleModify.title: Role membership changed
roleModify.description: A successful role binding update followed the failed sign-in sequence.
roleModify.context: Link with role ownership and prior request chain.

pluginReload.title: Plugin reloaded during review window
pluginReload.description: Lifecycle activity overlaps the same operating period and should stay visible.
pluginReload.context: Correlate plugin timeline and runtime health.

permissionDenied.title: Permission denied after mutation
permissionDenied.description: A denied request appears after the role change and may signal drift or misuse.
permissionDenied.context: Escalate only after same actor and same request review.

logList.hint: Investigate backend audit records by request chain, actor, resource, and time window instead of treating the list as a passive archive.
logList.tableHint: Use presets, correlation filters, and quick actions to move from a suspicious signal into a concrete investigation path.
logList.emptyDescription: No records match the current filters. Adjust the time window, request chain, or preset and try again.
logList.readonlyNotice: This workbench is read-only. It helps investigate audit trails, not change audit records.
logList.factSourceHint: The page consumes the settled backend `/api/audit/logs` read contract and `audit.read` permission directly.
logList.correlationSubtitle: Start from request ID, actor, resource, or session clues and then narrow the table.

filters.resourceTypePlaceholder: Resource type, such as user / role

requestChain.title: Traceable request coverage
requestChain.description: How many current rows can be chained by request or trace identifiers.
requestChain.action: Pivot to the latest request chain

rbacRisk.title: RBAC-sensitive slice
rbacRisk.description: Rows that likely need role, permission, or ownership review.

failedFlow.title: Failed operation slice
failedFlow.description: Rows that should be reviewed for retry loops, denied access, or actor misuse.

sameRequest.title: Same request chain
sameRequest.description: Filter the workbench around request {requestId} and inspect preceding or following events.
sameRequest.empty: No request ID is available for this row, so request-chain correlation is limited.

sameActor.title: Same actor
sameActor.description: Investigate surrounding actions by {actor} to distinguish routine work from escalation.

sameResource.title: Same resource
sameResource.description: Continue with the same resource path for {resource} and compare repeated access patterns.
